name: zaps-and-nutzaps
prompt: I want to add zaps to my Nostr client so users can tip each other with Lightning. I also heard about something called nutzaps with Cashu — should I support those too? Walk me through what NIPs I need.
expected_output: Response covers NIP-57 for Lightning zaps with the full protocol flow (kind:9734 zap request, kind:9735 zap receipt, LNURL integration), explains NIP-61 for nutzaps with Cashu tokens (kind:9321, kind:10019), and recommends supporting both for maximum compatibility.
assertions: Response identifies NIP-57 as the primary NIP for Lightning zaps
Response mentions kind:9734 as the zap request event kind
Response mentions kind:9735 as the zap receipt event kind
Response explains that the kind:9734 zap request is NOT published to relays but sent to the recipient's lnurl callback URL
Response mentions LNURL integration as a requirement (lud16, allowsNostr, or lnurl pay endpoint)
Response identifies NIP-61 as the NIP for nutzaps (Cashu-based zaps)
Response mentions kind:9321 as the nutzap event kind
Response mentions kind:10019 as the nutzap mint recommendation event where recipients list their trusted mints and P2PK pubkey
